FlavorText: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

Abilities: [{"name": "Transform", "text": "If Ditto is your Active Pokémon, treat it as if it were the same card as the Defending Pokémon, including type, Hit Points, Weakness, and so on, except Ditto can't evolve, always has this Pokémon Power, and you may treat any Energy attached to Ditto as Energy of any type. Ditto isn't a copy of any other Pokémon while Ditto is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.", "type": "Pokémon Power"}]
FlavorText: Capable of copying an enemy's genetic code to instantly transform itself into a duplicate of the enemy.
